title: 2-deoxy-D-glucose chemical exchange sensitive spin-lock (CESL) MRI of the rodent brain
author: Philipp Boehm-Sturm
materials: Goal: injected dose of 1 g/kg body weight.

steps.title: Understand MRI scan protocols
steps.instruction: The MRI protocol includes the following scan protocols (Boehm-Sturm, et al., 2025). Glossary: RARE: rapid acquisition with relaxation enhancement (turbo spin echo sequence) WASABI: Simultaneous mapping of water shift and B1 (Schuenke P, Windschuh J, et al., 2017) T1rho: CESL sequence to map R1rho=1/T1rho DWI: diffusion weighted imaging FAIR: flow sensitive alternating inversion recovery (sequence for perfusion imaging) EPI: echo planar imaging (DWI and FAIR use spin echo EPI readout)

steps.title: Localizer: Tune and Match Resonator
steps.instruction: When the animal is placed into the scanner first tune and match (wobble) the volume resonator. Run scan with Automatic Setup / Adjustments.

steps.title: Adjust Scan Geometry and Shim
steps.instruction: a. Reduce the number of slices to 6, adjust the slice position so that the anterior commissure is covered by the uppermost slice. b. Switch back to 38 slices and adjust center to trachea. c. Adjust the ellipsoid shim volume to the center of the brain. d. Make sure that the read offset is 0.00.

steps.title: WASABI B0/B1 Mapping
steps.instruction: Import the slice orientation of 02_T2_TurboRARE_mapshim and add 2.625 mm to the slice offset! B0 and B1 mapping is recommended to check B0/B1 homogeneity in the given experimental setup and to correct for inhomogeneities in the image post processing step. In our experimental setting, the B0 and B1 maps were only used once to check sufficient homogeneity and not used for corrections. WASABI is particularly efficient in mapping B0 and B1 but other sequences can be used. The slice offset is specific to the MCAO model to ensure the center of the striatum is covered, which is the brain region most severely affected by the stroke. In other disease models different offsets can be used to perform 2DG-CESL MRI in the brain regions of interest. Run scan.

steps.title: Import Slice Orientation for T1rho Protocols
steps.instruction: Import the slice orientation of 03_WASABI_B0_B1_mapping to all following T1rho protocols (04_T1rho_pre to 06_T1rho_post).

steps.title: Run Post-2DG T1rho Low Resolution Scan
Run DWI Trace EPI Saturation Scan
steps.instruction: Diffusion (DWI) and perfusion (PWI) MRI are of specific interest in the stroke model. These sequences can also be of interest in other disease contexts but are not mandatory for CESL imaging. Import the slice orientation of 02_T2_TurboRARE_mapshim and adjust the FOV Saturation slice. Run scan.

steps.title: Run Perfusion FAIR EPI Studyshim Scan
steps.instruction: a. Import the slice orientation of 03_WASABI scan. b. Use the study shim option. Use of a global shim ensures a better global inversion pulse of the FAIR sequence. Run scan.

steps.title: Perform Pre-MRI Surgical Procedures
steps.instruction: Animals undergo two surgical procedures before the MRI examination: a. Femoralis catheter implantation to inject 2DG during the MRI measurements. b. 90 min middle cerebral artery occlusion (MCAO) to induce focal cerebral ischemia. All animal procedures mentioned herein are specific to stroke modeling in the rat using 90 min MCAO and can be replaced with other disease models.

steps.title: Anesthetize Animals
steps.instruction: Anesthetize animals using isoflurane in a 70%/30% N2O/O2 mixture. Anesthesia is induced with 5% isoflurane and maintained at 1.75-2.5% isoflurane during the femoralis catheter placement and the MCAO and 1.75% during MRI to achieve a breathing rate of ~60-100/min.

steps.title: Maintain Animal Body Temperature
steps.instruction: For MRI, place the animal on a heated water blanket to ensure constant body temperature of 37±0.5 °C.

steps.title: Minimize Motion Artifacts
steps.instruction: Use ear and toothbar fixation to minimize motion artifacts.

steps.title: Prepare MRI System
steps.instruction: Prepare the Bruker BioSpec (70/20 USR) 7 Tesla MRI system, including the 86 mm transmit volume resonator and receive rat brain surface coil. Ensure Paravision 6.0.1 software is ready.

steps.title: Monitor Respiration Rate
steps.instruction: Monitor the respiration rate using a small animal monitoring system (SA Instruments, Stony Brook, NY, USA).

steps.title: Create B0 Map
steps.instruction: Create a B0 map with: a. 3 averages, default FOV and b. Map S/N 20. Run B0 mapping (Start).

steps.title: Inject 2DG Solution
steps.instruction: Slow injection of 2DG solution through the femoralis catheter over 2 min! Inject the calculated volume plus the dead volume of the catheter.
